title: Tampa Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tampa, with a Z-Score of +4.00. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Tampa are characterized by high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 59%, while the wind speed is moderate at 12.6 km/h. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) indicates that the heat wave is having a significant impact on the city's energy consumption.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to ensure public safety and minimize disruptions.
